    <item>
        <guid>nba530712</guid>
        <title>Alex Caruso: Paces OKC in defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/alex-caruso-3952</link>
        <description>Caruso contributed 31 points (11-19 FG, 8-14 3Pt, 1-3 FT), two rebounds, two steals, two blocks and one assist across 32 minutes in Monday's 122-115 double-overtime loss to the Spurs in Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 18 May 2026 9:09:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530711</guid>
        <title>Victor Wembanyama: Makes history in victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/victor-wembanyama-5809</link>
        <description>Wembanyama racked up 41 points (14-25 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 12-13 FT), 24 rebounds, three assists, three blocks and one steal across 49 minutes in Monday's 122-115 double-overtime win over the Thunder in Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 18 May 2026 8:57:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530710</guid>
        <title>Dylan Harper: Starting sans Fox</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/dylan-harper-6549</link>
        <description>Harper will start Monday's Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals against the Thunder.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 18 May 2026 5:10:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530707</guid>
        <title>De'Aaron Fox: Ruled out Monday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deaaron-fox-4116</link>
        <description>Fox (ankle) has been ruled out for Monday's Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals against the Thunder, Marc J. Spears of ESPN.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 18 May 2026 4:40:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530705</guid>
        <title>De'Aaron Fox: Expected to play in Game 1</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deaaron-fox-4116</link>
        <description>Head coach Mitch Johnson said he expects Fox (ankle) to play in Monday's Game 1 of the Western Conference Finals against the Thunder, Andrew Schlecht of The Athletic reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 18 May 2026 4:10:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
